rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with House (4), so the need to focus on home base, habits, and emotional grounding is already in play. House colors your calling through base structure, fixed conditions, and the foundations that have to hold before anything else can stretch. In Present, Dog (18) becomes the pivot, so the theme that reliable support and trust become key turns into both pressure and opportunity. Dog often points to steady support, loyal alliance. The likely direction shows in Future through Ship (3), and it suggests movement away from the familiar broadens perspective once the pivot is met directly. Here, Ship emphasizes movement, distance, trade, and the shift that comes once something leaves its old context. House (4) with Ship (3) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of home and journey, asking you to strengthen routines and boundaries while staying alert to drifting without destination. Dog (18) is the real hinge in this spread. Here, Dog emphasizes steady support, loyal alliance, and the kind of dependable help that shows whether the path can actually hold in real life. House (4) with Ship (3) keep emphasizing a blend of home and journey, asking you to strengthen routines and boundaries while staying alert to drifting without destination. Invest in dependable alliances so Ship (3) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
